text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, guess what! Earlier, my tea stalk floated
upright, and I drew a fortune that said "great
blessing"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Those are signs that I'm going to conquer the
Twinkle Series by sheer luck, don't you think?!
The great Shiraoki has ordained it all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
